nodes.name: ProjectionToggle.tsx
nodes.summary: Segmented toggle for switching the world map between projection modes, with disabled-state messaging.

nodes.name: RadarChart.tsx
nodes.summary: SVG radar/spider chart rendering a single polygon over multiple labelled axes with grid rings.

nodes.name: SectionDivider.tsx
nodes.summary: Labelled horizontal section divider used to separate content groups within a page.

nodes.name: ShareCompact.tsx
nodes.summary: Compact share widget offering quick links to share the current page to social platforms plus copy-to-clipboard.

nodes.name: ShareToolbar.tsx
nodes.summary: Full share toolbar exposing native Web Share, social platform links, and copy-to-clipboard for the current page.

nodes.name: Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Desktop collapsible sidebar navigation with grouped module entries, theme/language controls, and embedded share widget.

nodes.name: Sparkline.tsx
nodes.summary: Minimal inline SVG sparkline rendering a numeric series as a single trend line with optional min/max markers.

nodes.name: StackedAreaChart.tsx
nodes.summary: SVG stacked area chart layering import and export trade volumes over time with hover tooltips.

nodes.name: StatTile.tsx
nodes.summary: Compact statistic tile displaying a label, primary value, optional sub-text, and icon.

nodes.name: StatWidget.tsx
nodes.summary: Statistic widget variant displaying a label, value, sub-text, and icon, with an optional fluid (full-width) layout.

nodes.name: TradeBalance.tsx
nodes.summary: Trade balance summary block comparing total exports and imports and rendering a localized surplus/deficit verdict.

nodes.name: TrendArrow.tsx
nodes.summary: Directional trend arrow indicating up/down/flat movement of a value, plus a helper to derive trend direction from two values.

nodes.name: ViewToggle.tsx
nodes.summary: Generic segmented view toggle for switching between mutually exclusive display options.

nodes.name: VoteBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Bundestag vote breakdown bar showing yes/no/abstain/absent proportions for a faction with an expandable detail panel.

nodes.name: hsSections.ts
nodes.summary: Static lookup tables mapping HS commodity section codes to German and English human-readable labels.

nodes.name: tokens.ts
nodes.summary: Design-system token definitions: light and dark color palettes plus shared spacing, font, and breakpoint scales consumed across all components.

nodes.name: ThemeContext.tsx
nodes.summary: React context provider for the design system that manages light/dark theme and DE/EN language state, persisting both to localStorage and exposing a theme palette, spacing tokens, and a translation function.

nodes.name: Badge.tsx
nodes.summary: Themed inline badge/pill component rendering short status text in one of several semantic color variants.

nodes.name: BalanceBarChart.tsx
nodes.summary: SVG trade-balance bar chart that plots yearly export/import net balance with hover interaction and localized currency formatting.

nodes.name: DataCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Generic themed card container with optional header, footer, and clickable/active states used to wrap dashboard content blocks.

nodes.name: EmptyState.tsx
nodes.summary: Themed placeholder shown when a data view has no results, optionally rendering a call-to-action element.

nodes.name: FilterToolbar.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable filter/search toolbar that renders a text search field plus a set of declarative select filters for list pages.

nodes.name: HBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Horizontal bar component that visualizes a single value relative to a max, with label, formatted value, and optional icon.

nodes.name: HSSectionBreakdown.tsx
nodes.summary: Trade breakdown widget that ranks HS commodity sections by export or import value, with partner selection and responsive layout.

nodes.name: InfoToggle.tsx
nodes.summary: Small expandable info/help toggle that shows or hides an explanatory text block on click.

nodes.name: LegalFooter.tsx
nodes.summary: Site-wide legal footer that renders data-source attributions for the current route plus imprint and licensing links.

nodes.name: LoadingSpinner.tsx
nodes.summary: Themed CSS loading spinner shown while async data is being fetched.

nodes.name: MobileNav.tsx
nodes.summary: Mobile slide-out navigation drawer with module entries, theme and language switches, and embedded share controls.

nodes.name: MultiLineChart.tsx
nodes.summary: SVG dual-line chart plotting export and import trade series over time with hover tooltips and localized axis labels.

nodes.name: PageHeader.tsx
nodes.summary: Standard page header rendering a title and optional subtitle with consistent design-system typography.

nodes.name: Pagination.tsx
nodes.summary: Pagination control rendering numbered page buttons with ellipsis truncation and previous/next navigation.

nodes.name: PartnerPicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown selector for choosing a trade partner country, displaying each partner with localized total trade value.

nodes.name: ProgressBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-segment horizontal progress bar that renders proportional colored segments from a segments definition.

nodes.name: HistoricalTable.tsx
nodes.summary: Table presenting a district's party vote shares across historical election years, highlighting the winning party per row.

nodes.name: KreisAutocomplete.tsx
nodes.summary: Autocomplete search input for German districts (Kreise) that filters GeoJSON features by name and exposes a reusable hit-filtering helper.

nodes.name: MapMode.tsx
nodes.summary: Map-centric election view orchestrating the choropleth map, metric/type selectors, district search, and the advanced analysis tabs.

nodes.name: PartyBarChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Horizontal bar chart rendering a single region's party vote shares for one election year, using shared party colors.

nodes.name: PartyToggles.tsx
nodes.summary: Toggle-button group letting users enable or disable individual parties in district charts, with readable text contrast against party colors.

nodes.name: PercentileBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Percentile bar widget positioning a district's value within a min/max range to show relative standing among all districts.

nodes.name: RadarCompare.tsx
nodes.summary: Radar chart comparing multiple regions across fixed party-share axes, with localized subject labels.

nodes.name: AdvancedAnalysis.tsx
nodes.summary: Election analysis dashboard tab hosting scatter plots, ranking tables, and change-over-time visualizations for district (Kreis) election data, with search, region filtering, and gain/loss leaderboards.

nodes.name: ChangeAnalysisCharts.tsx
nodes.summary: Chart components rendering vote-change analysis: top gains/losses bar charts, a delta histogram, and per-state average change bars for election comparisons.

nodes.name: ChangeMap.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive SVG choropleth map coloring districts by vote-share change between two elections, with hover tooltips, zoom-to-region, and a diverging legend.

nodes.name: CompareMode.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-region comparison view that fetches election results for several Kreise and renders side-by-side bar charts, time series, and difference tables.

nodes.name: DifferenceTable.tsx
nodes.summary: Table comparing per-party vote shares across multiple selected regions, color-coding the spread between min and max values per party.

nodes.name: DistrictAnalysis.tsx
nodes.summary: Deep-dive single-district (Kreis) analysis page combining historical tables, party bar charts, percentile bars, and election-type comparison line charts.

nodes.name: ElectionMap.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive SVG choropleth of Germany's districts colored by party share or turnout, with hover tooltips, zoom-to-region, and a metric-aware legend.

nodes.name: RankingTable.tsx
nodes.summary: Sortable ranking table listing districts by a metric, deriving the Bundesland (state) from each district's AGS code.

nodes.name: RegionPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Side panel showing a selected region's election detail: per-party bars, time series across years, and metadata, fetched from the API.

nodes.name: ScatterPlot.tsx
nodes.summary: Configurable scatter plot correlating two district metrics with selectable axes and party/state color modes, plus an interactive color legend.

nodes.name: TimeSeriesChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-party line chart plotting vote shares over election years, supporting comparison overlays between regions.

nodes.name: electionUiUtils.tsx
nodes.summary: Shared UI helpers for the elections module: election-type constants, themed select styling, localized type labels, AGS normalization, and section-title rendering.

nodes.name: mapColors.ts
nodes.summary: Color-scale functions mapping election metrics (party share, turnout, vote change) to fill colors for choropleth maps.

nodes.name: mapGeometry.ts
nodes.summary: GeoJSON projection utilities converting district coordinates into SVG path data and building a lookup map of district geometries.

nodes.name: normalizeWahlen.ts
nodes.summary: Normalization helpers converting raw API election values into display percentages and resolving district display names.

nodes.name: partyColors.ts
nodes.summary: Central palette and labels for German parties and federal states, with light/dark theme variants and AGS-to-state-color helpers.

nodes.name: regionBarRows.ts
nodes.summary: Helper transforming a region's election row into bar-chart data using shared party colors and normalization utilities.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Shared TypeScript type definitions for election map rows, distinguishing API-shaped rows from normalized display rows.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root application component that wires up React Router with the dashboard layout shell, theme provider, and lazy-loaded routes for every module (elections, Bundestag, legislation, EU law, world map, lobby register, etc.).

nodes.name: AbstimmungsDetail.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the detailed breakdown of a single Bundestag vote (Abstimmung), showing each parliamentary group's yes/no/abstain/absent tallies sorted in political left-to-right order with party-derived colors.

nodes.name: AbstimmungsListe.tsx
nodes.summary: Searchable, paginated list of Bundestag votes (Abstimmungen) that lets the user filter by title and select a poll to inspect in detail.

nodes.name: Hemicycle.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the Bundestag seating chart (hemicycle) as an SVG, coloring each seat by party and overlaying per-seat vote results with reveal animation; the project's central parliamentary visualization.

nodes.name: bundestag-seats.ts
nodes.summary: Static dataset exporting the raw geometric coordinates and party category for every Bundestag seat (RAW_SEATS) plus the total seat count, used to draw the hemicycle.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel module that re-exports the entire design system: theme context, charts, and all reusable UI components plus their prop types for convenient single-source imports.

nodes.name: useSearchParamsState.ts
nodes.summary: Custom React hook that binds a single URL query-string parameter to component state, returning the current value and a setter that updates the search params.

nodes.name: DashboardLayout.tsx
nodes.summary: Top-level layout shell that renders the sidebar navigation (or mobile nav), derives the active module from the current path, and hosts the routed page content via React Router's Outlet.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application bootstrap entry that mounts the App component into the DOM root with React StrictMode and loads global CSS.

nodes.name: Admin.tsx
nodes.summary: Placeholder admin page rendering a localized page header and phase-placeholder message; a stub awaiting future admin functionality.

nodes.name: Bundestag.tsx
nodes.summary: Bundestag page that orchestrates the vote browser: fetches votes, seat distribution, and deputy data via the API, and composes the AbstimmungsListe, AbstimmungsDetail, and Hemicycle components with deep-linkable poll selection.

nodes.name: Coalition.tsx
nodes.summary: Placeholder page for the coalition agreement (Koalitionsvertrag) showing a localized header and phase-placeholder text.

nodes.name: DemocracyIndex.tsx
nodes.summary: Placeholder page for the democracy index module displaying a localized header and phase-placeholder message.

nodes.name: EuParliament.tsx
nodes.summary: Placeholder page for the EU Parliament module showing a localized header and phase-placeholder text.

nodes.name: LobbyRegister.tsx
nodes.summary: Large, data-rich lobby register page that lists registered lobbying organizations with search and pagination and visualizes aggregate statistics through D3, MapLibre maps, and Recharts charts.

nodes.name: NotFound.tsx
nodes.summary: 404 fallback page rendered for unmatched routes, showing a localized not-found message and a link back to the dashboard.

nodes.name: Overview.tsx
nodes.summary: Dashboard landing page that fetches headline statistics and latest items across modules (laws, EU law, Bundestag votes) and presents them as stat widgets and data cards with navigation shortcuts.

nodes.name: EuCourtCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Expandable card component rendering a single EU Court of Justice case, lazy-loading full case detail (leitsatz, keywords, linked legal acts) from the API on expand.

nodes.name: EuLawCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Expandable card component for a single EU legal act (regulation/directive/decision), showing type badges, EuroVoc tags, bilingual summaries, and navigation to linked German laws.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript type definitions for EU-law domain entities: legal-act list items, court cases, detail responses, and linked-law references.

nodes.name: GesetzDetail.tsx
nodes.summary: Detail panel for a single German law, rendering metadata, summary, context, a coloured diff synopsis, linked lobby actors, and related court rulings.

nodes.name: UrteilCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Card component for a single German court ruling (Urteil) with collapsible tenor/impact sections, legal-area badges, and links to referenced laws.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript type definitions for the legislation domain: Gesetz (law) and Urteil (court ruling) record shapes consumed by gesetze components.

nodes.name: utils.ts
nodes.summary: Shared helpers for legislation and court data: legal-area classification from law abbreviations, court badge variants, ISO date formatting, and URL/endpoint builders.

nodes.name: useApi.ts
nodes.summary: Core data-fetching hook that builds API URLs from a configurable base, fetches JSON with abort/retry handling, and exposes data/loading/error/refetch state.

nodes.name: useDebouncedValue.ts
nodes.summary: Small React hook that returns a debounced copy of a value, updating only after the given delay elapses without changes.

nodes.name: useMediaQuery.ts
nodes.summary: React hook wrapping matchMedia to track a media query's match state, plus a useIsMobile convenience hook bound to the design-system mobile breakpoint.

nodes.name: Elections.tsx
nodes.summary: Elections page rendering an interactive district (Kreis) map with autocomplete search, party-result overlays, and theme-aware SVG geometry.

nodes.name: EuLaw.tsx
nodes.summary: EU-law page that lists EU legal acts and Court of Justice rulings with filtering, search, pagination, and aggregate counts by type and court.

nodes.name: Legislation.tsx
nodes.summary: Legislation page listing German laws and court rulings with search, filtering, and a master-detail layout that opens GesetzDetail and UrteilCard views.

nodes.name: WorldMap.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive MapLibre world-map page rendering country-level indicators with projection switching, floating widget panels, and Safari/globe capability detection.

nodes.name: worldFilters.ts
nodes.summary: Small predicate helpers for world-map data filtering: detecting real countries and checking for World Bank region presence across rows.

nodes.name: sourcesCatalog.ts
nodes.summary: Static catalog mapping each dashboard page to its curated list of data sources, plus a helper that derives the footer source-line i18n key from a route pathname.

nodes.name: CompareBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Design-system component rendering a labeled horizontal comparison bar for country vs. region vs. world values with a configurable value formatter.

nodes.name: LineChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive SVG line chart with optional area fill, gridlines, annotations, and a hover tooltip that tracks the cursor across data points.

nodes.name: MonoLabel.tsx
nodes.summary: Small design-system primitive rendering uppercase monospaced label text styled from the active theme tokens.

nodes.name: PercentileBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Design-system component visualizing a percentile value as a filled bar with optional inversion and a localized footer caption.

nodes.name: i18n.ts
nodes.summary: Aggregating i18n barrel that merges the per-feature DE/EN message modules into unified dictionaries and provides the placeholder interpolation helper.

nodes.name: common.ts
nodes.summary: Shared DE/EN translation dictionaries for cross-cutting UI labels (navigation, common actions, shared components) used across the dashboard.

nodes.name: elections.ts
nodes.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the elections feature labels and copy.

nodes.name: eu.ts
nodes.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the EU law feature (legislation, court rulings, and related UI copy).

nodes.name: gesetze.ts
nodes.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the German legislation (Gesetze) feature labels and descriptions.

nodes.name: lobby.ts
nodes.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the lobby register feature labels and explanatory copy.

nodes.name: overview.ts
nodes.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the dashboard overview/landing page labels.

nodes.name: sources.ts
nodes.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the data Sources page labels, captions, and footer source lines.

nodes.name: world.ts
nodes.summary: Largest DE/EN translation dictionary covering the world map feature, including country indicators, metric labels, and map UI copy.

nodes.name: Sources.tsx
nodes.summary: Sources page that lists each dashboard feature's curated data sources, combining the static sources catalog with live API-reported worldmap sources and their freshness and value counts.

nodes.name: ci.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow triggered on push to main and on every pull request, running TypeScript typecheck, production build, and lint as quality gates.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: The 'Typecheck, build, lint' job on ubuntu-latest: checks out the repo, sets up Node 20, installs dependencies with npm ci, runs the production build, then runs lint informationally.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project documentation (in German) covering the tech stack, all SPA routes/pages, the design system, API conventions, and the local development and deploy workflow for the Res.Publica Dashboard.

nodes.name: deploy.sh
nodes.summary: Bash deploy script that pulls the latest main branch, installs dependencies with npm ci, and runs the production Vite build into the Nginx-served dist directory.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Vite HTML entry document providing the #root mount point, Google Fonts preconnect/stylesheet links, favicon, and the module script tag that bootstraps the React app from src/main.tsx.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: NPM manifest defining the dev/build/lint/preview scripts and pinning runtime dependencies (React, react-router-dom, d3, recharts, maplibre-gl) and the TypeScript/Vite/ESLint dev toolchain.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript solution-style config that holds no files of its own and delegates to the tsconfig.app.json and tsconfig.node.json project references.

nodes.name: tsconfig.app.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the application source under src/, enabling strict mode, bundler module resolution, react-jsx, and ES2020 target with DOM libs.

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration scoped to the Node-side build tooling (vite.config.ts), targeting ES2022 with strict linting and bundler module resolution.

nodes.name: .cursorrules
nodes.summary: Cursor AI editor rules file defining project conventions and coding guidelines for AI-assisted development in the Res.Publica dashboard repository.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern file for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, excluding build artifacts, dependencies, and generated files from knowledge-graph scanning.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Minimal configuration for the Understand-Anything plugin, setting the output language for generated analysis content.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat config wiring up TypeScript, React Hooks, and React Refresh rules for linting the dashboard source tree.

nodes.name: BUG8-gesetz-titel-TODO.md
nodes.summary: Developer TODO note documenting a UX bug where the legislation list view shows raw file identifiers instead of human-readable display titles, with the open decision and implementation steps.

nodes.name: world.geojson
nodes.summary: GeoJSON dataset of world country boundaries served as a static asset, used by the MapLibre world map to render political-data choropleths.

nodes.name: useLocalStorage.ts
nodes.summary: Custom React hook that persists a state value to localStorage, hydrating from storage on mount and writing back on every update.

nodes.name: useOffsetPagination.ts
nodes.summary: Custom React hook providing offset-based pagination state (page, limit, computed offset) with page-setting and reset helpers for paginated API list views.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global base stylesheet imported by the application entry point, establishing root-level CSS resets and baseline styling for the SPA.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript ambient declaration file referencing Vite client types so that import.meta.env and asset imports are correctly typed across the project.

nodes.name: ConsoleComponents.jsx
nodes.summary: Standalone UI-kit prototype defining reusable themed visualization primitives (sparklines, line/radar charts, KPI tiles, percentile and comparison bars) for the Country Console, exposed as globals on window.

nodes.name: CountryConsole.jsx
nodes.summary: Large standalone Country Console prototype assembling indicator formatting helpers and a global ranking view from country statistics, building on the ConsoleComponents UI primitives.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration registering the React plugin and project-level build/dev-server options for the dashboard SPA.

layers.name: Application Shell & Routing
layers.description: Bootstraps the SPA and wires React Router: the root App component with lazy-loaded module routes, the main.tsx mount point, the DashboardLayout shell, and global base CSS.

layers.name: Feature Pages & Components
layers.description: Route-level pages (Bundestag, Elections, Legislation, EU Law, World Map, Lobby Register, Overview, Sources) plus their feature-specific components, charts, maps, and colocated helpers/types for the German/EU political modules.

layers.name: Design System
layers.description: The reusable component library and theming foundation: design tokens, the ThemeContext (light/dark + DE/EN i18n), the per-feature i18n dictionaries, and shared UI primitives, charts, navigation, and layout components.

layers.name: Hooks & Data Access
layers.description: Custom React hooks encapsulating shared stateful logic and the public Node API client, including useApi for data fetching plus localStorage, debounce, media-query, pagination, and URL-param state hooks.

layers.name: Static Data & Assets
layers.description: Static datasets and pure data utilities consumed by the visualizations: Bundestag seat geometry, the sources catalog, world GeoJSON, world-map filter predicates, and standalone UI-kit prototypes.

layers.name: Configuration & Build
layers.description: Project configuration and build tooling: package.json, the TypeScript project configs, the Vite and ESLint configs, Vite ambient type declarations, and AI/tooling config files.

layers.name: Infrastructure & CI/CD
layers.description: Deployment and continuous-integration assets: the GitHub Actions workflow that typechecks, builds, and lints, plus the Nginx-targeted production deploy script.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation including the German README covering stack, routes, and deploy workflow, and developer TODO/bug notes.
